{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221900447B4246BFF66975D1C36B"}"},"total":5693},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7449675968665584409","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好有意思的一本书啊！我之前并不喜欢看养娃的，感觉人太小了没什么让人激动的戏份，但是这个不一样！绝，太绝了啊！好看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734518810,"group_id":"7438911088525052953","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"快穿白月光综漫爱好者","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/iD0/GoS9qjfXwBKlMDsjVLV4IFda4Cg12hYnKACuR1","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d086fbb70c2a499db424e7e161c46ff2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705665&x-signature=0a%2BYdwFJ7HKoOzeIJJN4D4oi038%3D","user_id":"4288518872370484","user_name":"ll云隐叶鸣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4288518872370484","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438911088525052953","book_info":{"abstract":"养崽权谋，无cp，有伪骨单箭头，主角寡王！主角自以为是穿书，其实是二周目重开简介: 
祁元祚有一群越品越神经病的家人。
祁元祚生而为太子，笃定整个皇室，只有自己是个正常人，殊不知外人眼中的太子殿下: 
七岁射虎，赢回祁连山九百公里疆域。 
十三岁杀穿江南世家，亲手主导九十七孝衣案踩着尸骨称圣成王。 
十五岁再赌祁连山，千里奇袭，和亲仪仗平推干里，武安君声名远扬。 
兄弟对他又恨又爱，姑姑对他情意难述，敌人对他咬牙切齿，臣子因他假死报国，就连穿越者也只敢在日记中称一句前辈。 
咿咿呀呀的童语唱着十五岁的太子: 
捣王庭，架鸾仗，满旗天山上；绣香帕、梦美郎， 金甲羞红装；问谁家儿郎？社稷开疆，文武安邦， 雏龙道上讳‘白王’。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/98f9140eda176f15106ce16768fac434","author":"文元党","author_id":"","book_id":"7438911088525052953","book_name":"癫！孤身边全是神经病！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8d8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":876,"name":"胎穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=876&name=胎穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":847,"name":"养崽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=847&name=养崽&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7438917137940349465","read_count":"91840","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"764988"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"303","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,穿书,胎穿,无CP,养崽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c5b1b4bbfef6c906742f2a0f59d4bc48~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361244&x-signature=%2B4w44NXUrdEEvEJTQxNFe0scDPI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"178562586390861","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"45"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221900447B4246BFF66975D1C36B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":61,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5722,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":55336},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7458948747656037145","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"天呐‼️不开玩笑，这是我看过的写的最好也最真实残酷的，帝王既有冷酷无情的一面，也有温柔情谊，角色塑造的非常好！！情感循序渐进十分细腻，我看得情到深处时眼泪哗哗流呜呜呜呜呜，但是真的很好看！！这是我看番茄这么久以来写的第一篇书评，因为真的很好很值得，书中人物的形象情感刻画很生动！！是真的能让人共情到的那种程度，真的很厉害！但素，作者能不能不这么刀啊啊啊呜呜呜，小太子前世那么惨，这次给孩子一点好的吧！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736678391,"group_id":"7438911088525052953","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"更新时间不定，本人学生","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2o984bajRmpGTEjEy6j7WU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8688e8b292de4ed592b55272e0a1d296~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706357&x-signature=x1GN0thdSbm0oeo0mmALtABs9LI%3D","user_id":"268757024380589","user_name":"花期x"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"268757024380589","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438911088525052953","book_info":{"abstract":"养崽权谋，无cp，有伪骨单箭头，主角寡王！主角自以为是穿书，其实是二周目重开简介: 太子美才旷古未有！
祁元祚：皇兄武德举世难寻。
这伪骨怎么了？这伪骨可太妙了！
剧情精彩，文笔很好，伏笔埋得恰到好处，烧脑又有趣，紧扣“癫”字，太子和祁帝目前氛围温馨， 后宫前朝民间的形形色色人的一系列的明争暗斗又使剧情跌宕起伏，是一部十分合格的群像文。
人物形象鲜明：三皇子时而阴暗狡诈时而乘顺呆傻，
                            四皇子表面如一条不要命疯狗，但却是个死傲娇
                            五皇子不举娘娘腔，十分记仇
                            六皇子假面骑士……
十分好看，地道那断读得我心疼，那可是光风霁月的太子殿下。这本不冲9.7实在可惜，读完满脑子都是太子殿下。小太子十分可爱又充满理性，看着太子殿下训狗，掌握全局，那就是一个爽啊，太子和五位皇子之间的‘打打闹闹’十分暖心搞笑啊
作者你累了就写，困了就写，无聊的时候再写，趁我们读者不注意，一不小心更了300章，吓我们一跳。你不要吊着我的胃口啊，呜呜呜呜呜呜呜","text_exts":[{"e":243,"s":240,"text":"娘娘腔","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A8%98%E5%A8%98%E8%85%94&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177417724475D1C36B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227468900468302742296%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227438911088525052953%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A8%98%E5%A8%98%E8%85%94%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":284,"s":280,"text":"假面骑士","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%81%87%E9%9D%A2%E9%AA%91%E5%A3%AB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177417724475D1C36B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227468900468302742296%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227438911088525052953%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%81%87%E9%9D%A2%E9%AA%91%E5%A3%AB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738992436,"group_id":"7438911088525052953","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"主控;成分雷点复杂;主页>[神作无CP]<好看","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Hk1Op45NiZfohvNz/+HMU=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b63570a839b447a7a01e7e8c99924197~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709599&x-signature=F1MRS4CCtD%2F%2FfWl3Pft8nr02EDE%3D","user_id":"92532106399","user_name":"㫪沁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92532106399","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue
